    Sign in
    Windows
    Get Windows 11

    Windows security

    Your security matters. From the moment you turn on your PC, Windows 11 defends against potential risks to help make sure your credentials, photos, and files don’t fall into the wrong hands.*

    Check for security updates

    AI-powered security

    Built-in features like Smart App Control and Microsoft Defender Antivirus make Windows 11 PCs harder to hack.

    Your privacy matters

    Powerful hardware and software—like Microsoft Pluton10 and Windows Hello4—work together to protect your data across devices.

    Layers of protection

    Windows 11 PCs help protect your data with layered security features such as malware defense, VPN support, and passkeys.

    AI-powered security

    From your every day to when you’re away, AI-powered Windows security keeps you safe.

    Trust your apps

    With the power of AI, Smart App Control can help predict which apps are safe to run on Windows 11.

    Your data protected

    Harder to hack and easier to update, PCs with Microsoft Pluton have the ultimate security processor built right in.10

    You are the security

    Windows 11 can lock your device when you leave, then, with Windows Hello, unlock it and sign you back in when you return.4*

    Your privacy matters

    Maintain your privacy wherever you are with Windows 11 security features that help protect what matters to you across your devices.

    Your privacy matters

    Maintain your privacy wherever you are with Windows 11 security features that help protect what matters to you across your devices.

    Microsoft Account

    From your PC to the cloud, online or on the go, your Microsoft account helps protect your identity and data.

    Learn more

    Privacy Dashboard

    Easily adjust settings and permissions in your Privacy Dashboard, like which apps are using your camera, mic, or location.

    Learn more

    Find My Device

    Locate, lock, or erase your device to protect your personal information and data if it’s lost or stolen.

    See how it works

    Your identity secured

    Step up your security with identity protections that keep what’s yours, yours.

    Your identity secured

    Step up your security with identity protections that keep what’s yours, yours.

    Windows Hello

    No more passwords to remember. Just sign into your Windows devices with facial recognition or your fingerprint.4

    Learn more

    Microsoft Authenticator

    Easy, secure sign-ins for all your online accounts using multifactor authentication, passwordless phone sign-in, or password autofill.

    Download it now

    Passkeys

    Forget the password. Get fast, easy, and secure sign-in and protection against phishing for your online accounts.4

    Set up your passkey

    Security from every angle

    Windows 11 PCs deliver layers of security to help keep bad actors at bay. From malware and data protection to trustworthy apps, your credentials, photos, and files are protected.

    What is malware?

    What is malware?

    Any software created to intentionally harm a computer can be considered malware. Common types include viruses, trojans, spyware, and ransomware. How they operate can vary from stealing your passwords to holding your files for ransom until you pay.

    Microsoft Defender Antivirus

    A next-generation protection solution that comes with Windows 11, Microsoft Defender Antivirus is real-time, always-on antivirus protection.

    Microsoft Defender SmartScreen

    If a website, application, or download is potentially malicious and could harm your computer, SmartScreen will warn you.

    Windows Firewall

    With Windows Firewall, unwanted traffic is blocked from entering your PC.

    Bluetooth protection

    Whether you’re using Bluetooth headsets, mice, keyboards, or other wireless accessories, you can feel confident that it’s a secure connection.

    Secure Wi-Fi

    Windows Wi-Fi supports industry standardized authentication and encryption methods, to help keep you safe no matter where you connect—even on public networks.

    Virtual private networks (VPN)

    A VPN, or virtual private network, is a secure tunnel connecting your PC and the internet. A variety of VPN apps are available in the Microsoft Store.

    Safety where you need it

    All Microsoft Store apps are verified for security, so you can trust what you install.

    Family Safety

    Manage your family’s digital safety with screen time limits, content filters, and activity monitors.5

    Download it now

    Microsoft Edge

    Built-in security features help fend off online threats as you safely browse the web with Microsoft Edge.6

    Try Edge today

    OneDrive

    Cloud-based file and photo protection helps you securely store, share, and sync your stuff across devices.7

    Create a free account

    Microsoft Defender

    Microsoft Defender8 works with Windows Security to protect your PC and gives you advanced protection across devices.

    Download now

    Explore Windows 11

    This is the best of Windows made better, with a Copilot for every person on every device.

    AI in Windows

    AI-powered features are part of Windows 11, giving you enhanced security, intuitive assistance, and the power to create beyond your imagination.

    Learn more

    Meet Windows 11

    Easier to use, to be productive, to stay safe, and to play to your heart’s content, Windows 11 lets you focus on what matters while it does the rest.

    Learn more

    Help me choose

    Not sure which PC is right for you? Let us help. Answer a few simple questions, and we’ll show you the PCs that can fit your needs.

    Take the quiz

    Shop Windows 11 PCs

    Sleek, innovative, and exactly what you need. Find a Windows 11 PC that fits your needs today.

    Shop all PCs

    Frequently asked questions

     | 

    Windows 11 devices feature Windows Security, including Microsoft Defender Antivirus, which protects you from viruses and malware.

    Your Windows 11 device comes with Microsoft Defender Antivirus built-in. You don’t have to pay extra for this antivirus protection.

    Windows Hello is a more secure way to sign into your device without a password. Learn more about Windows Hello and how it works.

    Download Microsoft Edge for safer online browsing. Microsoft Edge has built-in security features like Microsoft Defender SmartScreen and Password Monitor to help you stay secure online.

    Find My Device lets you remotely lock your device or locate it if it’s lost or stolen. You’ll need to sign in to your device with a Microsoft account and have your device’s location turned on for it to work. Learn more about how Find My Device works.

    • Windows Insider Program
    • Windows support
    • Windows Blog
    • Ask the community
    • Newsletter
    • Screens simulated. Features and app availability may vary by region.
    • Some features require specific hardware. Learn more at Windows 11 Specs and System Requirements.
    • * For supported devices with latest security updates installed.
    • 4 Device dependent and may require compatible accessory. Learn more about Windows Hello.
    • 5 App available for download through Microsoft Store. Manage your family’s digital safety with screen time limits, content filters, and activity monitors. Learn more.
    • 6 Available on the latest version of Microsoft Edge. Must be signed into a Microsoft account.
    • 7 Files may be made available for offline use. Otherwise, internet access required. Fees may apply.
    • 8 Subscription sold separately. App availability varies by geography.
    • 10 Built in on all Copilot+ PCs and hardware dependent on other Windows 11 PCs.
